description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a brick exterior, featuring a flat roof and a modest, rectangular footprint. The front facade includes a driveway leading to a carport, a small garden bed with shrubs, and a main entrance door. Windows are arranged in a simple, functional pattern, with several on the front and side walls, providing ample natural light. A white picket fence encloses a backyard area, which contains a patio set and is partially shaded by a large tree. The property also includes a paved driveway and a detached car parked near the entrance. The overall design is practical and suburban, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on utility.
description: A single-story brick bungalow with a flat roof, carport, picket fence, and a small garden, set in a suburban context.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, garden bed, and a tree near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick wall, backyard patio area, and the white picket fence enclosing the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view with the picket fence, large tree, and patio furniture visible, as well as the back windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, driveway, and additional garden elements along the side wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
